atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent discomfort with the scars from her previous breast reduction surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals well-healed incisions with no signs of infection or redness in either breast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The incisions appear widened in one area.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's primary concern is persistent discomfort with the scar tissue.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Continue Mederma scar gel twice daily on the affected scar.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in six months to reassess the scar tissue and determine if further intervention is needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Arrange for photographs to be taken of the scars for documentation.
